description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Unit test that runs on pull requests, pushes to the master branch, and on workflow dispatch requests. The workflow has multiple jobs: build, test, render_gallery, and tests_complete. The build job compiles the code in multiple configurations using a matrix strategy, and uploads the installation directory as an artifact. The test job depends on the build job, downloads the installation directory, and runs tests in multiple configurations. The render_gallery job renders gallery images. The tests_complete job ensures that all tests have completed successfully.
